prompt: Plot the 60-day YES-token price history for 'Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?' on Polymarket — they're the 55.5% favorite with $217k of 24h volume. I want to see how each playoff round has shifted their championship odds.

The Oklahoma City Thunder are currently the 55.5% favorite to win the 2026 NBA Finals. While a full 60-day daily history is not available, the recent weekly price action shows a significant jump in their championship odds over the last 24 hours.

As of May 2, 2026, the Thunder YES-token has seen a 24-hour volume of $9,964,141.75.

The provided chart illustrates a period of stability at the 51.5% mark followed by a recent rally to 55.5% starting on May 2. This uptick likely reflects a specific playoff milestone or game outcome, though explicit round-by-round ladder market data (such as odds for advancing to the Conference Finals or NBA Finals) was not fetched in this session to pinpoint the exact driver for each round.
